title: Clarks Gun Mod
description: Clark makes more MCreator slop. Title is self explanatory, kinda.
body:
This is a simple mod intended for use on the MCreative Pirate SMP. It adds (at the current moment) 3 weapons that may or may not be overpowered. More about the SMP can be found here ([https://discord.gg/9hMAtrvB](https://discord.gg/9hMAtrvB)).

The Marine is inspired by the 1861 Colt Navy. A fire variant is available.

The Jack Rifle is inspired by the 1860 Uberti Henry Rifle. A thunder variant is available.

The Miquelet is inspired by some really cool spanish double barrel. A TNT shooting variant is available.
